aiAssistant.title: Talk through your learning goals
aiAssistant.description: Ask for help clarifying what you need, planning your next study step, or deciding what kind of tutor would fit.

composer.label: Message Mentora AI
composer.placeholder: Ask about a subject, study goal, curriculum, or tutor fit...
composer.hint: Press Enter to send. Use Shift + Enter for a new line.

empty.title: Start with what you are trying to learn
empty.description: The assistant can help you describe your goals, compare study paths, and prepare better criteria before you search for tutors.

examples.algebra: I need help improving my algebra.
examples.tutorLevel: I don't know what tutor level I need.
examples.igcse: Can you help me prepare for IGCSE math?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unreadCount: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}

states.emptyDescription: Messages, booking updates, and platform alerts will appear here.

fallback.title: New notification
fallback.body: Open Mentora to view the latest update.

aiTutorFinder.title: Find a tutor that matches your learning needs
aiTutorFinder.description: Search with structured criteria so recommendations keep working even when the AI text provider is unavailable.
aiTutorFinder.formDescription: These fields map directly to the backend recommendation engine.

placeholders.goal: I need help with IGCSE math before exams

validation.queryRequired: Tell us the subject or topic

results.title: Recommended tutors
results.matchesFound: {count, plural, one {# match found} other {# matches found}}

empty.title: Your matches will appear here
empty.description: The backend will score tutors by subject, curriculum, language, price, and quality.

noResults.title: No tutors matched this search
noResults.description: Try a broader subject, a different curriculum, or a higher hourly rate.

page.title: Find your tutor
page.description: Start with a guided match, then refine the results with search, language, price, rating, and curriculum filters.

curriculum.title: Select Curriculum
curriculum.description: Choose the educational system you want to study under.
curriculum.fallbackDescription: Custom study tracks and courses tailored to your academic needs.

level.title: Select Education Level
level.description: Choose your current academic grade level.

subject.title: Select Subject
subject.description: Choose the area you need help with to connect with the best experts.

aiCta.title: Want a faster tutor match?
aiCta.description: Let AI rank tutors by your subject, level, curriculum, language, and budget.

filters.title: Search and filter tutors
filters.description: Your guided choices are already applied. Refine the list by price, language, rating, or keywords.
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, subject, or keyword

results.count: {count, plural, one {# tutor found} other {# tutors found}}
results.emptyDescription: Try a broader subject, another curriculum, or clear the filters to browse more tutors.

page.title: Create your tutor profile
page.description: Add the teaching details learners need before they decide to message or book with you.

descriptions.languages: Add the languages you can teach in.
descriptions.education: Share the education background that supports your teaching.
descriptions.experience: Add relevant teaching or professional experience.

placeholders.name: Full name
placeholders.headline: Math tutor with 5 years of experience
placeholders.bio: Tell learners about your teaching style, strengths, and the students you help best.

errors.save: Could not save the tutor profile. Please try again.

validation.bioMin: Bio must be at least 10 characters
validation.hourlyRateNumber: Hourly rate must be a number
validation.startMonthRange: Start month must be between 1 and 12
validation.endMonthRange: End month must be between 1 and 12
validation.educationMin: Add at least one education entry

login.title: Log In to Mentora
login.description: Welcome back! Please enter your details.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Egyptian phone number (e.g. 01012345678)
validation.roleInvalid: Please choose a valid account type

errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Find the right tutor for your learning goals
hero.description: Browse verified tutors or ask Mentora AI to suggest matches based on your subject, level, language, and budget.
hero.verifiedDescription: Compare subjects, levels, prices, and availability.

howItWorks.title: How Mentora works
howItWorks.subtitle: Go from tutor search to booked lesson in three clear steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Search verified tutors by subject, level, price, language, and availability.
howItWorks.step2Description: Ask questions, share your learning goals, and confirm the tutor is the right fit.
howItWorks.step3Description: Choose a time, confirm your lesson, and pay securely through Mentora.

reviews.title: What learners and families say
reviews.review1Text: My son improved in both chemistry and physics after a few focused lessons.
reviews.review2Text: Ms. Ghada explained German clearly and helped us choose a learning plan that made sense.
reviews.review3Text: My child is more confident in Arabic and looks forward to every lesson.
reviews.review4Text: Supportive, patient, and easy to communicate with before booking.

startLearning.title: Ready to find your tutor?
startLearning.description: Search verified tutors, compare your options, and book the lesson that fits your goals.

footer.description: Mentora connects learners with verified tutors for personalized lessons, secure booking, and clear communication before every session.
footer.newsletterDescription: Get tutor-search tips, platform updates, and learning resources in your inbox.
